item.title: Architecture KB landing and entry pages
item.intent: /architecture must show structured entries browsable by concern and pattern type, each following the standard record template with problem, when to use, how it works, trade-offs, and related patterns.
steps: Create src/pages/architecture/index.astro with entries grouped by concern
Render the standard record template fields from frontmatter
Add browsing by concern and pattern type
Show status badge (draft/working/stable) on each entry

acceptanceCriteria.text: /architecture route lists entries browsable by concern

acceptanceCriteria: Individual entries render the structured record template
